channel.title: gir on Cillian Berragan
channel.description: Recent content in gir on Cillian Berragan

item.title: Predicting Property Values within the Liverpool Authority District using Spatial Econometric Models
item.description: This essay presents the outcome of analysis using multi level models to consider the effect of arbitrary data aggregation into census units.

item.title: Spatial Autocorrelation and Geographically Weighted Regression
item.description: This essay presents the outcome of analysis using multi level models to consider the effect of arbitrary data aggregation into census units.
